channel.title: Lean Ledger
channel.description: Fresh takes for budget-minded households and frugal optimizers.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Frugal is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the mindset community this week.

item.title: The energy checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified energy purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of subscriptions
item.description: The most common early stumbles in subscriptions, and the cheap corrections that fix them for budget-minded households and frugal optimizers.

item.title: "grocery budget tips" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about grocery budget tips through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your mindset questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the mindset questions budget-minded households and frugal optimizers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in energy with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest energy adjustments that budget-minded households and frugal optimizers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: grocery budget tips
item.description: The persistent myths around grocery budget tips, stress-tested against what budget-minded households and frugal optimizers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your groceries in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying groceries project for budget-minded households — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: "grocery budget tips" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "grocery budget tips" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why budget-minded households are rethinking Energy
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how budget-minded households and frugal optimizers approach energy — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Mindset on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in mindset — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Subscriptions: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping subscriptions for budget-minded households and frugal optimizers.
